arts.ttl: Celtic Player Ratings: The duo running the show at Hampden in semi-final rout
arts.sum: Celtic were on top form against St Johnstone at Hampden, winning 5-0 to power through to the Scottish Cup final.

arts.ttl: Celtic score four in 12 minutes to destroy St Johnstone
arts.sum: Watch highlights as Celtic score four times in 12 first-half minutes on their way to a 5-0 Scottish Cup semi-final win over St Johnstone.

arts.ttl: Daizen Maeda leads Celtic slaughter job on St Johnstone and puts Rodgers on brink of another Treble – 5 talking points
arts.sum: It was a Sunday stroll in the sun for the Hoops are heading for another Treble after a Saints demolition job

arts.ttl: Five-star Celtic sweep past St Johnstone to reach Scottish Cup final
arts.sum: The holders wreaked vengeance following defeat in Perth two weeks ago.

arts.ttl: Reason Celtic have one player less on bench for Scottish Cup semi-final
arts.sum: Reason Celtic have one player less on bench for Scottish Cup semi-final

arts.ttl: Viljami Sinisalo states what simply isn't being discussed in the Celtic dressing room
arts.sum: But Sinisalo told Celtic TV that talk of the champions-elect winning a domestic Treble isn’t even being mentioned inside the dressing room. Viljami Sinisalo plays down Treble talk in the Celtic dressing room

arts.ttl: St Johnstone vs Celtic LIVE as Brendan Rodgers sticks with tried and tested for Hampden
arts.sum: The remaining place is up for grabs in next month's Scottish Cup final - who will join Aberdeen in the Hampden showpiece?

arts.ttl: What we spotted about Kasper Schmeichel as Celtic release Lennoxtown footage before big Scottish Cup tie
arts.sum: The Finnish international is widely expected to start today’s Scottish Cup tie against St Johnstone but after what 67 Hail Hail spotted in training footage released by Celtic, Schmeichel’s return between the sticks could be closer than fans think. Brendan Rodgers puts his players through their paces as he prepares Celtic for the Scottish Cup tie against St Johnstone.

arts.ttl: Watch Brendan Rodgers' reaction to daft Rangers question in Celtic's Scottish Cup press conference
arts.sum: St Johnstone stand in his way of creating more history for Celtic so when Rodgers was asked about a possible guard of honour from Rangers at Ibrox, a game that is two weeks and two fixtures away, the Parkhead boss treated the question with the disdain is deserved. Even before Celtic faced Bayern Munich in Germany in the Champions League, Rodgers’ full focus at that time was on the Scottish Premiership tie with Dundee United.

arts.ttl: Ex Celtic loan star lined up for mega transfer move to European giants just 3 months after leaving Parkhead
arts.sum: Bundesliga big hitters Borussia Dortmund want to snap up Alex Valle from Barcelona this summer
